final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing employee ID card design for "字节跳动" (ByteDance), showing both front and back sides in one image (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a realistic, authentic employee ID aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must show both front and back sides of the ID card in one image
Subject: must include employee ID card for "字节跳动" (ByteDance)
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a realistic lighting atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: needs a realistic ID card material treatment — exact finish and sheen are yours
Text (verbatim): must include "字节跳动" as the company name
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must show both front and back sides of the card
Avoid:
